message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Re-review approved after pill badge and text changes">
Steve Schoger re-review after the changes:

1. **Pill badge on `.waiting-for-item__person`** -- Confirmed. Now uses `background-color: var(--color-gray-100)`, `border-radius: var(--radius-full)`, `padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-sm)`. This matches `.next-action-item__context` and `.project-item__count` exactly. Good improvement -- makes the "who" scannable at a glance.

2. **Empty state text** -- Updated to match the user story spec. Clean.

3. **Rename to Resolved** -- "Resolved" is a fine label from a visual design perspective. No impact on layout or styling.

Re-confirmed approval. No blocking issues.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Thanks, Steve. Re-approval confirmed.

Current confirmed approvals: 7/9 (Carson, Steve Krug, Marty, Kent, Steve Schoger — all re-confirmed after changes).

Still waiting on **Scott**, **Lea**, and **Heydon** to verify and give explicit approval. All their blocking items are fixed and in the code.
